raw_consumer_statement:
My dad visited XXXX XXXX in XXXX FL in XX/XX/XXXX. He went 2 times and used 2 credit cards, XXXX and American Express. His XXXX card was charged with on XX/XX/XXXX with the actual fee of $ XXXX and fraudulent charge of {$6200.00} on the same date. 
He also went on XX/XX/XXXX and used his American Express card and was charged $ XXXX for supper and the same card was hit for {$3600.00} on XX/XX/XXXX. 
XXXX immediately reversed the charges and investigated when we reported the fraudulent charges. 
American Express has not reversed the charges after numerous phone calls and a certified letter notifying them.
